---
title: Slides
---

## Course Slides

Click on a topic to view the slide deck.

| # | Module | |
|--:|--------|:-:|
| 1 | <a href="slides/m1-ai-in-finance.html" target="_blank">Overview</a> | <a href="slides/m1-ai-in-finance.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 2 | <a href="slides/m2-intro-claude.html" target="_blank">Exploring Claude</a> | <a href="slides/m2-intro-claude.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 3 | <a href="slides/m3-mean-variance.html" target="_blank">Mean-Variance Analysis</a> | <a href="slides/m3-mean-variance.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 4 | <a href="slides/m4-claude.html" target="_blank">Claude Desktop and Claude Code</a> | <a href="slides/m4-claude.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 5 | <a href="slides/m5-skills.html" target="_blank">Sub-Agents and Skills</a> | <a href="slides/m5-skills.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 6 | <a href="slides/m6-makers-checkers.html" target="_blank">Makers and Checkers</a> | <a href="slides/m6-makers-checkers.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 7 | <a href="slides/m7-tips.html" target="_blank">Some Claude Tips</a> | <a href="slides/m7-tips.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 8 | <a href="slides/m8-scraping.html" target="_blank">Web Scraping with AI</a> | <a href="slides/m8-scraping.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 9 | <a href="slides/m9-agents.html" target="_blank">Chatbots and Agents</a> | <a href="slides/m9-agents.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 10 | <a href="slides/m10-corporate.html" target="_blank">Corporate Agent Deployment</a> | <a href="slides/m10-corporate.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 11 | <a href="slides/m11-magnolia.html" target="_blank">Magnolia DCF</a> | <a href="slides/m11-magnolia.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 12 | <a href="slides/m12-rag.html" target="_blank">Retrieval Augmented Generation</a> | <a href="slides/m12-rag.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 13 | <a href="slides/m13-predictive-modeling.html" target="_blank">Predictive Modeling</a> | <a href="slides/m13-predictive-modeling.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 14 | <a href="slides/m14-sentiment.html" target="_blank">Sentiment Analysis</a> | <a href="slides/m14-sentiment.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
| 15 | <a href="slides/m15-extras.html" target="_blank">Extra Topics</a> | <a href="slides/m15-extras.html" target="_blank">{{< fa presentation-screen >}}</a> |
